**Known Issues**
- The user can not tell if the model has been prompted. Add a visual indicator using a ... chat bubble that appears when the model is thinking. This should be similar to the standard message typying animation. When the model is done thinking and begins returning a response output, the chat bubble should disappear.
Missing the ability to @pages or @folders
Limited multimoal ability. We should implement file attachments so that users can attach files to their prompts.
